plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to zero.
Reduce semiconductor exposure by selling SMH.
Trim CRWD to reduce single-name concentration.
Increase QQQI for income focus and SPY for broad market.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a larger cash buffer.
Expect lower volatility and a more defensive portfolio stance.
conservative.read: This mode targets approximately 1.5% monthly return with a strong focus on capital preservation. Expect significantly lower drawdowns compared to your current book, but also reduced upside potential.

plan: Eliminate leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to reduce risk.
Trim broad index holdings (SPY, QQQ) to reduce concentration.
Increase exposure to quality tech (CRWD) and add a strong setup (AMD).
This plan balances growth with risk reduction, aiming for steady gains.
It seeks to lower overall leverage and concentration while adding promising names.
Expect a moderate risk profile with potential for solid returns.
balanced.read: This mode targets approximately 2.5% monthly return by balancing growth and risk. It aims to reduce concentration and leverage while adding promising long setups, with a moderate buffer against significant drawdowns.

plan: Sell income (QQQI) and one leveraged ETF (SPAL).
Trim broad index exposure (SPY, QQQ) to allow for concentration.
Increase leveraged ETF (SOXL) and add conviction names (AMD, CRWD).
This plan aggressively pursues growth by concentrating in high-conviction ideas.
It leverages up on strong setups and uses leveraged ETFs for amplified gains.
Expect higher potential returns but also significantly larger drawdowns and leverage decay.
aggressive.read: This mode targets approximately 4% monthly return, aggressively pursuing growth through concentration and leverage. Expect amplified upside but also substantially larger drawdowns and the risk of rapid losses due to leverage and ETF decay.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and volatile sectors (SMH).
Eliminate high-beta tech (CRWD) to reduce risk.
Significantly increase QQQI for income generation.
Increase SPY for stability and broad market exposure.
This plan prioritizes reliable monthly distributions and low drawdowns.
Expect steady income with limited growth and reduced volatility.
income.read: This mode targets approximately 1% monthly return, prioritizing steady income and capital preservation through income-focused ETFs and broad market exposure. Expect low drawdowns but minimal capital appreciation potential.
